name: Rosys Design System
description: Unified design language for Rosys Patterns — a sewing pattern testing platform and community. Warm, editorial, Apple-inspired with a signature pink accent.

references.name: pretext
references.role: Typography and text layout principles — line joining, smart paragraph detection, content-aware spacing, and rich text formatting from raw/unstructured source text.

philosophy.summary: Quietly elegant, modern, effortless — like the garments our users sew.
principles: Content-first: typography and whitespace do the heavy lifting, not decoration.
Warm, not sterile: warm neutrals and a signature rose accent replace cold grays and blues.
Apple-grade polish: Inter typography, system font fallbacks, tight letter-spacing, glass effects.
Smart defaults: the UI should parse, detect, and beautifully format whatever data it receives.
Responsive by nature: every component works from 320px mobile to 1600px desktop without breakage.
Subtle motion: transitions at 200ms, hover lifts at 0.07 opacity shadow, scale nudges at 0.97.

pretext_influence.line_joining: Continuation lines from PDF/raw extraction are joined when: previous line doesn't end with punctuation, current line starts lowercase, and neither line is a header.
pretext_influence.smart_parsing: Raw text is classified into 7 content types: text, numbered, bullet, heading, table-row, dash-item, note — each rendered with distinct visual treatment.
pretext_influence.key_value_detection: Lines matching 'Label: value' or 'Label — description' get bold labels automatically.
pretext_influence.table_detection: Size chart rows (Size XXS XS S M L XL) and tab-separated data auto-render as formatted tables.
pretext_influence.orphan_filtering: Standalone number-only lines (artifacts from PDF column extraction) are silently dropped.

dash-item-card.description: For 'Label — description' content patterns (fabric suggestions, materials, etc.)

pageContainer.padding: px-4 sm:px-6 lg:pl-[19.5rem] lg:pr-6 py-5 lg:py-8

iconography.library: lucide (lucide-react for React, lucide-svelte for SvelteKit)

rosys-platform.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 (@theme block in app.css)

content_formatting.description: Intelligent content rendering pipeline inspired by pretext's approach to structured text from unstructured sources.
pipeline: 1. Server: joinWrappedLines() — re-joins hard-wrapped PDF lines using continuation heuristics
2. Server: parseInstructionSections() — splits into titled sections by ALL-CAPS header detection
3. Client: parseContent() — classifies each line into one of 7 rich types
4. Client: groupTableRows() — coalesces adjacent table-row lines into table blocks
5. Client: Svelte/React renderer — maps each type to a distinct visual component

content_types.text: Standard paragraph — 14–15px, rosys-fg-secondary, leading-[1.8]. Auto-detects key:value patterns for bold labels.
content_types.numbered: Pink rounded badge (rosys-50/rosys-600) + text. Auto-detects 'Name — description' for bold split.
content_types.heading: 15px font-semibold rosys-fg — detected from ALL-CAPS lines under 60 chars, converted to Title Case.
content_types.dash-item: White bordered card with dot + bold label + ' — ' + description. For 'Material — properties' patterns.
content_types.note: Amber callout box with icon. Triggered by 'NOTE:', 'TIP:', 'IMPORTANT:' prefixes.
content_types.table-row: Grouped into striped HTML tables with rosys-50 header row. Detected from tab-separated or size-measurement rows.
